$comment: MongoDB Atlas Vector Search Index Definition — Apply via Atlas UI or CLI
description: Create this index on the 'cerebro.documents' collection

fields.$comment_dimensions: Adjust numDimensions to match your embedding model: OpenAI text-embedding-3-small=1536, Gemini text-embedding-004=768, OpenAI text-embedding-3-large=3072

fields.$comment: Allows filtering by document name in vector search queries

atlasUI: 1. Go to MongoDB Atlas → Your Cluster → Browse Collections
atlasCLI: atlas clusters search indexes create --clusterName <clusterName> --file mongo-vector-index.json
